name: SUPER UFO FIGHTER
short_description: The space sport "SUPER UFO FIGHTER" is all the rage in the galaxy. And UFO pilots, known as Shwoopers, are battling it out today!
detailed_description:
Join our Discord


About the Game

The space sport "SUPER UFO FIGHTER" is all the rage in the galaxy.
And UFO pilots, known as Shwoopers, are battling it out today!

◆Shuforians compete in intense 1v1 battles for supremacy!◆

Deposit the "target" item into your goal to score.
The key to victory is to control the stage items!
Use your shwoop beam to collect the target before your rival and bring it home!


Or use the beam to intercept, throw, and attack your opponent!
Anything goes when trying to get the prize!


Use the stage gimmicks and special items to your advantage to win!

◆Play alone, or together with friends online!◆

Or friends to play local battles!
Multiple modes and settings for online play!

◆And much more!◆

Need to practice?
Jump in the training mode to study new UFOs.
Or check your progress as a Shwooper in the Collection Mode!

◆About SUPER UFO FIGHTER Friend's Pass◆

This is a free application allows you to play online with people who own the full version of "SUPER UFO FIGHTER
Cross-play with different platforms is possible.

■■Matching procedure■■

A: Players playing with the full version of "SUPER UFO FIGHTER"

1)After launching the application, select "Online" from the main menu.
2)Select the connection region where you want to play the game.
3) Select "Friend Match" -> "Create Room" and tell the person you want to play with the 6-digit code that appears on the screen.

B: Players playing with "SUPER UFO FIGHTER Friend's Pass"

1) After launching the application, select "Online" from the main menu.
2) Select the same connection region as the player you want to play with.
3) Select "Friend Match" -> "Join a room" and enter the 6-digit code given to you by the player you are playing with.

When playing, make sure that the version displayed in the upper left corner of the "Online" mode menu ("Version : ○○") is the same as that of the player you are playing with.
If the version is not the same, you will not be able to play online.
-----------------------------
If you have the full version of the game or are thinking about playing with friends, please take advantage of the "SUPER UFO FIGHTER Friend's Pass" as well!
